name: Pang Le
page_title: Pang Le 龐樂 [Zhao Wei, Liu Zhang] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: With Li Yi, turned against Zhao Wei and killed him.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	龐樂


	 Simplified Chinese 
	庞乐


	 Pronunciation 
	Pang² Le4


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Páng Lè


	 Wade-Giles 
	P‘ang Le

	 Other Names 
	Pang Yue (龐樂)

	 Name Notes 
	Pang Le’s personal name, 樂, may be seen Romanized as Le or Yue in various sources with deference to the translator’s interpretation.

full_text:
Pang Le 龐樂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Le (龐樂). With Li Yi, turned against Zhao Wei and killed him. Pang Le was affiliated with Zhao Wei and Liu Zhang.
